categories.label: Identity & advertising
categories.description: Prevent ad tracking and personalization by Google, Honor and third-party networks.

checks.title: Delete the advertising ID
checks.risk: A unique identifier tracked by ad networks to build your profile across all apps.
checks.whyItMatters: Since Android 12, you can fully delete this ID rather than just reset it.

checks.title: Disable Google personalized ads
checks.risk: Without this step, Google uses your history to target the ads shown across its services.

steps.label: Go to adssettings.google.com in your browser

categories.label: Honor account
categories.description: Limit data sharing with Honor through your account and its connected services.

checks.title: Disable Honor ID personalization
checks.risk: Honor uses your usage history and data tied to your Honor ID to personalize its services and recommendations.
checks.whyItMatters: These options are usually enabled by default when the Honor account is created.

steps.label: Open settings
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > Honor ID > Privacy and personalized service

steps.label: Turn off "Marketing messages" or "Recommendations" if enabled

checks.title: Disable recommendations in AppGallery / Game Center
checks.risk: AppGallery and Game Center collect your install and usage history to show personalized recommendations.
checks.whyItMatters: On post-2020 Honor phones with Google services, Honor's AppGallery can coexist with the Play Store; both must be configured separately.

steps.label: Repeat the step in Game Center if present

categories.label: Network & sovereign DNS
categories.description: Encrypt your DNS queries and choose a provider that does not resell your data.

checks.title: Enable a sovereign private DNS
checks.risk: Without a private DNS, your ISP can see every site you visit, even over HTTPS.
checks.whyItMatters: Private DNS (DoT) encrypts these queries and sends them to an operator you choose.

steps.label: Open wireless and network settings
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > Mobile network > More > Private DNS

steps.label: Enter the hostname recommended for your country

checks.title: Disable permanent Wi-Fi/Bluetooth scanning
checks.risk: Android scans Wi-Fi and Bluetooth networks continuously to improve location, even when you are not using it.

categories.label: Voice assistants & keyboard
categories.description: Prevent permanent listening and the collection of your keystrokes.

checks.title: Disable "Hey Google"
checks.risk: With the Google hotword on, the microphone is listening at all times.

steps.label: Open the Google app, then "Settings" > "Google Assistant"
Go to "Hey Google & Voice Match" and turn it off

categories.label: MagicOS services
categories.description: Disable MagicOS system services that personalize or recommend content.

checks.title: Disable MagicOS system recommendations
checks.risk: MagicOS shows personalized suggestions and recommendations in the home screen, Honor Search, Honor Health and Themes, based on your usage history.
checks.whyItMatters: These recommendations are enabled by default and may include sponsored content.

steps.label: In Honor Search, tap the settings icon and turn off suggestions

categories.label: Diagnostics & reports
categories.description: Stop the automatic sending of usage and diagnostic reports to Honor.

checks.title: Disable Honor diagnostics
checks.risk: Honor collects usage and error reports containing information about your device and your habits to "improve" its services.

steps.label: Turn off "Join User Experience Improvement Program"
Turn off "Detailed data" if the option is present

categories.label: App permissions
categories.description: Check that no app has unjustified access to your microphone, camera or location.

checks.title: Audit sensitive permissions
checks.risk: Some apps keep access to the microphone, camera or your location in the background far beyond what is necessary.

steps.label: Review each category (Microphone, Camera, Location) and restrict suspicious apps
